common.brandHeroLine: Edit, compress, merge and manage PDFs instantly — PurPDF-grade clarity, speed, and trustworthy exports from pdfpilot.

header.accountAriaUser: Account menu — saved PDFs from Edit PDF and other tools, sign out

home.searchNoResults: No tools match “{{query}}”. Try another word or clear the search.
home.footerProcessing: Files are processed in your session. Need the raw API? See the project README for self-hosting on GitHub Pages.
home.ratingsNote: Ratings and comments are shown only after real submissions.

hero.title: Edit and download PDFs instantly
hero.subtitle: Fast, simple, and secure PDF editing directly in your browser. No installs. No hassle.
hero.signInBlurb: Sign in or create an account to continue.

account.savedPdfsHint: PDFs you changed in Edit PDF (and other tools) while signed in — open, download, or delete anytime.

auth.downloadBlurb: Sign in or create an account, then your file downloads automatically. You stay signed in on this device.

emailSection.pickTabHint: Pick a tab, then complete the fields and tap Continue.

reset.blurb: We will email you a link to choose a new password. After you reset it, return here and sign in with your new password.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.birthYearRange: Birth year must be between 1900 and {{max}}.
errors.resetEmailRequired: Enter the email for your account.
errors.emailInvalid: That email address does not look valid.

megaFooter.termsAgree: By using our tools you agree to the
megaFooter.termsTail: . Files are processed for your session; see the site footer for contact details.

plannedTool.defaultBody: This tool is on our roadmap. We will ship it as a focused flow when conversion or server pieces are ready; your toolkit card summarizes the intended behavior.

ocr-pdf.title: OCR PDF
ocr-pdf.description: Make scans searchable — needs your API (ocrmypdf + Tesseract on the server).

merge-pdf.title: Merge PDF
merge-pdf.description: Combine multiple PDFs into one file.

split-pdf.title: Split PDF
split-pdf.description: Split by page ranges or extract every page.

organize-pdf.title: Organize Pages
organize-pdf.description: Reorder, rotate, or delete pages, then download.

add-page-numbers.title: Add page numbers
add-page-numbers.description: Stamp page numbers with placement, ranges, and formats — in your browser.

compress-pdf.title: Compress PDF
compress-pdf.description: Tries your API (qpdf / Ghostscript); falls back to in-browser pdf-lib when the API is missing.

pdf-to-jpg.title: PDF to JPG
pdf-to-jpg.description: Export pages as JPEG. ZIP or single files.

pdf-to-png.title: PDF to PNG
pdf-to-png.description: Export pages as lossless PNG in a ZIP — all in your browser.

pdf-to-text.title: PDF to text
pdf-to-text.description: Download plain .txt from selectable text (not for raw scans).

scan-to-pdf.title: Scan to PDF
scan-to-pdf.description: Camera or photos: trim, enhance, multi-page PDF.

sign-pdf.title: Sign PDF
sign-pdf.description: Sign any page, duplicate or copy/paste placements, then download.

fill-pdf.title: Fill PDF form
fill-pdf.description: Fill AcroForm fields and download — processing stays in the browser.

flatten-pdf.title: Flatten PDF
flatten-pdf.description: Flatten fillable forms or rasterize pages to images — client-side.

unlock-pdf.title: Unlock PDF
unlock-pdf.description: Remove password via your API (qpdf / Ghostscript when configured).

encrypt-pdf.title: Encrypt PDF
encrypt-pdf.description: Password-protect with AES-256 (qpdf on the server).

add-watermark.title: Add Watermark
add-watermark.description: Text or image watermark, page ranges, preview, then download.

pdf-to-word.title: PDF to Word
pdf-to-word.description: Draft .docx in your browser — PDF is not uploaded for conversion (use OCR PDF for scans first).

word-to-pdf.title: Word to PDF
word-to-pdf.description: Draft PDF in your browser — .docx is not uploaded for conversion.

gst-invoice.title: GST invoice PDF
gst-invoice.description: Supplier, buyer, HSN lines — download a tax invoice PDF in the browser.

remove-pages.title: Remove pages
remove-pages.description: Delete pages in the grid and download — same engine as Organize PDF (browser-only).
remove-pages.plannedBody: You are on the live Remove pages flow (shared with Organize PDF). Select pages, delete, then download.

extract-pages.title: Extract pages
extract-pages.description: Extract ranges or every page — same engine as Split PDF (browser-only).
extract-pages.plannedBody: You are on the live Extract pages flow (shared with Split PDF). Use ranges or extract every page, then download.

repair-pdf.title: Repair PDF
repair-pdf.description: Recover many damaged PDFs — your API runs qpdf to rewrite structure (optional password if encrypted).
repair-pdf.plannedBody: Repair needs trusted binaries on the API. We plan to expose this behind your self-hosted backend when qpdf or similar is configured.

powerpoint-to-pdf.title: PowerPoint to PDF
powerpoint-to-pdf.description: Convert .pptx to PDF — usually needs LibreOffice or a document API on the server.
powerpoint-to-pdf.plannedBody: High-fidelity .pptx → PDF almost always runs on a server (LibreOffice / Gotenberg). We will wire an optional document service like Word to PDF.

excel-to-pdf.title: Excel to PDF
excel-to-pdf.description: Convert spreadsheets to PDF — typically server-side rendering.
excel-to-pdf.plannedBody: Spreadsheet layout is best rendered server-side. A dedicated Excel-to-PDF module is planned alongside your API.

html-to-pdf.title: HTML to PDF
html-to-pdf.description: Turn web pages or HTML files into print-ready PDFs — planned as a headless-browser or API-backed tool.
html-to-pdf.plannedBody: HTML printing needs headless Chrome or a document API. We will add this as an optional backend feature when you are ready to self-host it.

pdf-to-powerpoint.title: PDF to PowerPoint
pdf-to-powerpoint.description: Editable slides from PDF — needs a trusted conversion service; not yet wired in this build.
pdf-to-powerpoint.plannedBody: Editable slides require LibreOffice or a commercial document API. We plan a server-backed path similar to PDF to Word.

pdf-to-excel.title: PDF to Excel
pdf-to-excel.description: Tables and sheets from PDF — server-side extraction is planned.
pdf-to-excel.plannedBody: Reliable table extraction needs OCR and layout models on the server. This tool will ship when we integrate a suitable pipeline.

pdf-to-pdfa.title: PDF to PDF/A
pdf-to-pdfa.description: Long-term archival PDF/A — requires specialized validators and converters we will add behind your API.
pdf-to-pdfa.plannedBody: PDF/A conversion and validation need specialized tools (e.g. veraPDF, commercial engines). We will expose this for self-hosted deployments.

rotate-pdf.title: Rotate PDF
rotate-pdf.description: Rotate thumbnails then download — same engine as Organize PDF (browser-only).
rotate-pdf.plannedBody: You are on the live Rotate flow (shared with Organize PDF). Use the arrows on each page, then download.

crop-pdf.title: Crop PDF
crop-pdf.description: Trim the viewing area with a uniform crop on every page — in your browser (crop box).

redact-pdf.title: Redact PDF
redact-pdf.description: Permanent blackout of sensitive text and images — needs careful burn-in; shipping as a dedicated tool later.
redact-pdf.plannedBody: True redaction must remove underlying content, not just draw black boxes. We will ship a dedicated redaction flow when the implementation meets that bar.

compare-pdf.title: Compare PDF
compare-pdf.description: Compare selectable text between two PDFs line-by-line (run OCR on scans first).

translate-pdf.title: Translate PDF
translate-pdf.description: Extract text locally and translate with an on-device model (Transformers.js), then download a simple text PDF.
translate-pdf.plannedBody: Layout is not preserved today — output is a plain text PDF. Layout-faithful translation would need heavier tooling later.
